---
title: "Research — Germán A. Tessmer"
description: "Working papers, publications, and datasets by Germán A. Tessmer. Labor economics, household surveys (EPH), informality, and applied econometrics in Argentina."
---

## Working Papers

- [**From Breaks to Bridges: Harmonizing the New and Old Permanent Household Survey for Consistent Labor Market Series**]{} *(with Bárbara Boggiano)*

---

## Data

- [**EPH – Observatorio. Encuesta Permanente de Hogares de Argentina. Explicada, etiquetada y ampliada**](https://doi.org/10.57715/UNR/BL85Z8){target="_blank"} *(with Santiago Moleres & Laureano E. Hess)*  
  Universidad Nacional de Rosario, 2024. [doi:10.57715/UNR/BL85Z8](https://doi.org/10.57715/UNR/BL85Z8){target="_blank"}

---

## Publications

- [**Cruzar la meta y seguir corriendo. La Universidad Nacional de Rosario y la empleabilidad de sus graduados en el Gran Rosario**](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/14532){target="_blank"} *(with Ana Inés Navarro, Vanesa D'Elia, et al.)*  
  Xanto Editora, 2018. ISBN: 978-987-42-9366-4.

---

## Reports & Outreach

Director and co-author of over 60 research and outreach reports published between 2015 and 2024 through the [Observatorio Económico Social UNR](https://observatorio.unr.edu.ar){target="_blank"} (ISSN 2683-9067), covering labor markets, monetary policy, housing, energy, and regional economics. All reports are available through the [UNR institutional repository](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/){target="_blank"}.

Selected reports:

- [**Nueva ley de alquileres: contexto general y situación de los estudiantes de UNR**](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/22647){target="_blank"} *(with Diego Marfetán Molina, Luciano Jara Musuruana, Alfredo Bula, Lucia Papa & Patricio Almeida Gentile)*  
  Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2021.

- [**Pre-Covid: Indicadores socio-económicos para AGR y Argentina**](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/18367){target="_blank"} *(with Luciano Jara Musuruana, Diego Marfetán Molina, Lucia Papa & Patricio Almeida Gentile)*  
  Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2020.

- [**La educación en Santa Fe y Rosario: resultados Aprender 2016**](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/17542){target="_blank"} *(with Patricio Almeida Gentile)*  
  Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2017.

- [**10 preguntas para entender las variaciones del tipo de cambio**](http://hdl.handle.net/2133/14520){target="_blank"}  
  Observatorio Económico Social UNR, 2016.
